天花板级别的战力，但就是畏畏缩缩怕这怕那的，出手几次就是作者为了跟男主促进关系的剧情。希望作者保持住岳绮罗人设然后清醒点不要恋爱脑，毕竟男人只是用了赏玩消遣的。","text_exts":[{"e":189,"s":186,"text":"岳绮罗","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B2%B3%E7%BB%AE%E7%BD%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741218232E3E307C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227438591039172199230%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227390683332117269566%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B2%B3%E7%BB%AE%E7%BD%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731934800,"group_id":"7390683332117269566","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"满qu 矫情 艾楠还有写历史相关却是文盲篡改历史的人跟作者全都倒霉运，永远都赚不到钱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3fcV4zDsSfIIMPWOj1golswn+eqXM7h0KI9fET86fWU","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e5ce66ef2055423dbdb6f2308bd6390c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702070&x-signature=oCrnub2%2FOJKGG0pcKMTeZ3LYnPo%3D","user_id":"1201093777035908","user_name":"｀芊羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1201093777035908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390683332117269566","book_info":{"abstract":"【装逼打脸+大佬+综影剧穿】
岳绮罗死后绑定了“恶毒女配改造系统”，据说是要净化她的黑化值，要把她净化成一朵出淤泥而不染的白莲花。
恢复实力以后岳绮罗看到挡她路的？杀！看到不顺眼的？杀！！敢算计她的？杀杀杀！！！杀到最后，连绑定她的系统，也被她拆城零件！
（注，星汉因为作者功底不行，前期没把握好岳绮罗人设，介意勿入！勿入！！中后期已渐入佳境）

第二个世界，【少年白马醉春风】原创女主✔️
第三个世界，【庆余年】言冰云✔
